# Weather Anomaly Analyzer - Project Instructions

## Overview
A Next.js web app that analyzes weather anomalies by comparing current weather against expected climate patterns for the next 20 years.

## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js API routes
- **Data Sources**: Weather API (current) + Climate forecasts (long-term)
- **UI Components**: React with modern patterns

## Project Requirements
- Real-time weather data fetching
- Climate forecast comparisons
- Anomaly calculation and scoring
- Interactive dashboard with visualizations
- Location-based analysis
